subject: Your cash cow links
body:
It's Alex.

I wanted to shoot you a quick email because I've gotten a lot of positive responses about this.

As you may have heard, I've started a new content format called Cash Cows (like Shark Tank but for helping businesses rather than negotiating with them).

We take a guest from one of our scaling workshops, and then I get super tactical and show them how to grow.

So far, two episodes have dropped.

Here they are:

- Watch Me Fix a Stranger's Business in 42 Mins (Step by Step). In this episode, I help Raymon, who owns 6 brick & mortar locations and we talk about how he can get to the next level.

- Building a Business for a Stranger in 56 Mins. In this episode, I help Ashley grow her personal styling business in LA.

That's all for now. Let me know what you think.

Alex

P.S * Business Owners Only * If you want to POTENTIALLY be featured on Cash Cows, you have to be a workshop attendee.

A member of my team will vet your company and see if you're a good fit.
